instruction: 请将以下自然语言问题转化为 Neo4j Cypher 查询语句。
input: 谁是论文《LLaGA: Large Language and Graph Assistant》的所有作者？
output: MATCH (p:Paper {title: 'LLaGA: Large Language and Graph Assistant'})-[:AUTHORED_BY]->(a:Author) RETURN a.name

input: 在 LLaGA 的论文中，有哪些基准模型被引用并进行了对比 (CITED_BY)？

instruction: 请将以下自然语言问题转化为 Neo4j Cypher 查询语句。

output: MATCH (p:Paper {title: 'LLaGA: Large Language and Graph Assistant'})-[:AUTHORED_BY]->(a:Author) RETURN count(a) AS AuthorCount
